title: Kinetic
description: A simple overhaul of the fall damage mechanic giving more meaning to falling.
body:
# ⛰️ Kinetic – A Fall Damage Overhaul Mod
Kinetic redefines how fall damage works in Minecraft, bringing a more dynamic and meaningful mechanic to the game. Instead of the usual fall damage that increases with height, Kinetic introduces a system where falls have varying effects based on distance. Shorter falls may offer rewards, while longer falls come with consequences. This new system adds a layer of strategy to mobility and exploration, making every fall a calculated risk.

## ⚙️ Features

- Dynamic Fall Damage – Short falls (under a certain height) will no longer damage you. Instead, they provide a positive effect such as increased speed for a short period of time.
- Increased Damage with Height – Falls from greater heights will inflict more damage, but with the twist that the damage is accompanied by negative status effects, such as slowness, weakness, or nausea, representing the consequences of falling from high places.
- Immersive Gameplay – Adds immersion by rewarding players for careful navigation and penalizing reckless falls, encouraging more thoughtful movement in dangerous areas.
  
### 📥 Usage

- Install the Mod – Simply place the ```kinetic-{version}.jar``` file into your Minecraft mods folder.
- No Tinkering Required – This mod works automatically, applying the effects based on your fall distance.

**⚠️ Note: This is an experimental mod that changes the way fall damage works, so use at your own risk! It has been tested for balance and stability but may require adjustments in future versions for a better experience.**
